free_text: Low energy neutrons elastic scattering on the even
selenium isotopes and generalized optical model
of the nuclei
Only graphs are given
Experimental details
Engl.translation of J,KSF
Flight base is 1.2 m
Stilbene crystal
Metallic selenium, weight 70-100 gram,
isotope enrichment 92 - 99 %.
Corrections were made on neutron absorption and
multiple scattering, angular resolution and so on.
Error is not specified
Maximal total error
Skorkin 1989-09-12
From authors, probably.
Compiled at the centre - CJD
M.M. Upper -> lower case correction.
Dates were corrected for 4-digits year.
BIB information was added.
Ref. J,KSF,,(8),15,1985 is not available for checking.
Ref. of Engl.translation was added.
